falsification_conditions.condition: The price breaks above $50,000 (key resistance level) with a confirmed close above this level
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout invalidates the HOLD signal by indicating strong upward momentum contrary to the bottom pattern expectation

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 200%+ of the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extreme volume would indicate a major market shift in sentiment, contradicting the current uncertainty and suggesting a clear directional move

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis point rate cut in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This major macro event would introduce a new catalyst that directly contradicts the current pattern analysis and blowoff score interpretation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
